payload.Application_Subtype: Demolition – House, Shed, Pool or other Structure (NOT for fire repair)
payload.ActivityCode: 649B  All Other Res Bldgs and Structures
payload.WorkDescription:
Demo permits include structure and foundation/flat work only. No grading is included with this permit.; •	Remove the fence (if needed only) to gain access to the backyard and place it back at the end of the project.
•	Drain pool if necessary
•	Disconnect Utilities (water, and electrical)
•	Remove and haul away pool equipment (Pump, filter, and heather) 
•	Electrical lines to be removed from pool panel. Label panel appropriately for spare breakers
•	Remove all concrete
•	Haul away concrete and debris
•	Back fill intervals of 6-8 inches with clean fill (dirt)  
•	Compact to 90% with engineering letter (Soil Engineering)
•	Perform compact test
•	Grade area to proper elevation away from the house. For drainage purpose

payload.Application_Subtype: Residential Sewer Replacement
payload.ProjectName: Pipe Burst, Inversion Liner, Drain Repipe: Sewer Line Replacement or Repair.
payload.WorkDescription:
Sewer line replacement or emergency repair of sewer line only. No other work is permitted.; -TTC will replace approximately 110 FT of 2 inch Cast Iron secondary drain pipe with new 2 inch ABS plastic pipe.
-TTC will replace approximately 25FT of existing 4 inch Cast Iron drain pipe from the toilet connection in the crawl space to the ABS plastic wye located on the outside of the foundation, with new 4 inch ABS plastic pipe.
-TTC will replace approximately 45FT of existing 4 inch Cast Iron and Asbestos Cement sewer pipe from the two-way clean out located behind the house to the 4 inch ABS plastic County clean out located by the fence, with new 4 inch HDPE SDR17 sewer pipe.
-TTC will utilize the excavation at the county clean out location to pipeline approximately 7FT of existing 4 inch Asbestos Cement and Clay pipe downstream to the County mainline connection.

payload.ActivityCode: 649B  All Other Res Bldgs and Structures
payload.WorkDescription:
Demo permits include structure and foundation/flat work only. No grading is included with this permit.; Scope of Work:
1. Sawcut, demolish, and remove pool/spa shell 2 feet below grade around the perimeter.
2. Break three drainage openings at the bottom of the pool and one at spa, approximately 2 feet wide each.
3. Backfill the pool/spa with soil and compact to complete the partial pool demolition.
4. Remove/cap and dispose of pool equipment and related materials generated by this scope of work.
